overall.description: A continuous drive along a futuristic elevated highway featuring transparent digital canopies overhead and multi-level interchanges. The journey transitions from an urban cityscape with towering skyscrapers to an arid mountainous landscape, with various vehicles overtaking along the way. The footage exhibits high-quality game engine rendering with a sleek sci-fi aesthetic.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a drive along a futuristic elevated highway, showcasing a transparent digital canopy overhead with holographic displays. The camera moves steadily forward with a concrete barrier on the right and massive support pillars on the left, while a futuristic city skyline rises in the distance. A green sports car overtakes on the left, emphasizing the high-speed nature of the roadway.

segments.scene_description: As the highway curves slightly left, the urban cityscape gives way to a sweeping view of an arid mountain range on the left. The digital canopy continues overhead, and various vehicles are visible on the road ahead. The support pillars move closer to the camera's left side as the vehicle progresses along the elevated structure.

segments.scene_description: The highway enters a complex interchange, curving right to reveal multiple levels of roadway infrastructure. A lower highway tier becomes visible beneath the main deck, while curved overpasses sweep through the frame. Futuristic buildings appear on the right side as the mountain range shifts to the center background, maintaining the sci-fi urban aesthetic.

segments.scene_description: The final segment features a straight stretch of highway with the mountain range prominent on the left and distant city towers visible ahead. The digital canopy continues overhead with its holographic displays. Multiple vehicles including a white vintage car and a blue sports car overtake on the left, while a military-style vehicle appears on the right, maintaining the dynamic traffic flow of this futuristic roadway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a futuristic elevated highway that transitions from a dense urban skyline into a sweeping arid mountain landscape. It begins moving steadily forward beneath a transparent digital canopy with holographic displays, passing massive support pillars as a green sports car speeds past on the left. As the highway curves, the cityscape recedes to reveal a vast mountain range, with the camera gliding along the elevated structure toward a complex multi-level interchange. The scene then shifts through a series of curving overpasses and lower roadway tiers, bringing futuristic buildings into view on the right while the mountains move into the center background. Finally, the road straightens out under the persistent digital canopy, where a white vintage car and a blue sports car overtake on the left as a military vehicle appears on the right against the backdrop of distant city towers.
